content:
💡 tickrs | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Displaying real-time stock market data and charts in a terminal environment.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time ticker data display • Terminal User Interface (TUI) • Data sourced from Yahoo! Finance • Customizable chart types (line, candle, kagi) • Configurable time frames and update intervals
📖 Summary: Tickrs is a Rust-based command-line application that provides real-time stock ticker data directly in the terminal. It leverages Yahoo! Finance for data and offers various customization options for displaying stock information, charts, and market hours.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
